Package org.eventb.internal.core.preferences

Class PrefUnitTranslator

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.preferences.PrefUnitTranslator
All Implemented Interfaces:
IXMLPrefSerializer<ITacticDescriptor>
public class PrefUnitTranslator extends Object implements IXMLPrefSerializer<ITacticDescriptor>
Tactic profile preference serializer and deserializer.

      public void put(IPrefMapEntry<ITacticDescriptor> unit, Document doc, Node parent)
      Description copied from interface: IXMLPrefSerializer
      Serializes the given preference into the given parent.

      put in interface IXMLPrefSerializer<ITacticDescriptor>
      Parameters:
      unit - a preference
      doc - the document where serialization takes place
      parent - the parent of the serialized preference

    • get

      public IPrefMapEntry<ITacticDescriptor> get(Node unitElem, IInjectLog log)
      Description copied from interface: IXMLPrefSerializer
      Deserializes the given node.
      Specified by:

      Parameters:
      unitElem - a node
      log - a log to record warnings about partially loaded nodes
      Returns:
      the deserialized preference

    • resolveReferences

      public void resolveReferences(IPrefMapEntry<ITacticDescriptor> entry, CachedPreferenceMap<ITacticDescriptor> map, IInjectLog log)
      Description copied from interface: IXMLPrefSerializer
      Replaces the reference placeholders, contained in the given preference, by actual references obtained from the given map.
      Specified by:
      resolveReferences in interface IXMLPrefSerializer<ITacticDescriptor>
      Parameters:
      entry - a preference
      map - a preference map
      log - a log to record warnings about unresolved references
